Source: Amazon Q Business API Reference
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/api-reference/Welcome.html
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Amazon Q Business - Welcome Page Content

## Main Sections

### QBusiness
This is the **Amazon Q Business API Reference**. Amazon Q Business is a fully managed, generative-AI powered enterprise chat assistant that you can deploy within your organization.

**Key Capabilities:**
- Question-answering
- Knowledge discovery
- Writing email messages
- Summarizing text
- Drafting document outlines
- Brainstorming ideas

Users ask questions of Amazon Q Business and receive answers presented in a conversational manner.

**Related Resources:**
- Amazon Q Business User Guide
- Overview of Amazon Q Business API operations
- IAM roles for Amazon Q Business
- Setting up for Amazon Q Business
- Amazon Q Business CLI Reference
- AWS General Reference

### QApps
The **Amazon Q Apps** feature capability within Amazon Q Business allows web experience users to create lightweight, purpose-built AI apps to fulfill specific tasks.

**Example Use Cases:**
- Marketing-related content generation apps to improve marketing team productivity
- Customer email writing and promotional content creation apps with specific voice, tone, and branding

**Resources:**
- Amazon Q Apps capabilities documentation
- Overview of Amazon Q Apps API operations
- IAM role for the Amazon Q Business web experience including Amazon Q Apps

## Navigation Structure
- AWS Documentation
- Amazon Q Business
- API Reference
- Welcome (current page)
